description: Index of structured knowledge extracted from Ofwat PR24 Final Determination PDFs

documents.title: Overview of Severn Trent Water's PR24 final determination
documents.summary: SVT-specific overview covering Outstanding business plan rating, £15bn total expenditure, bill impacts, key performance commitments, and enhancement investment priorities.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Aligning risk and return
documents.summary: Sector-wide policy document setting allowed return at 4.03% WACC, cost of equity 5.10%, notional gearing 55%, and introducing ASM, OAM, and DDCM mechanisms.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Aligning risk and return — Allowed return Appendix
documents.summary: Detailed CAPM build-up methodology for the 4.03% allowed return, covering risk-free rate, TMR, beta estimation, and cost of debt components.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Assurance requirements for delivery of enhancement schemes appendix
documents.summary: Framework for PCDs, gated allowances, and third-party assurance requirements for the £44bn enhancement programme.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances
documents.summary: Core expenditure document setting £104bn sector allowances with 7% cost challenge; SVT allowed £14.9bn total (base £8.6bn, enhancement £6.7bn).

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances (amended February 2025)
documents.summary: Amended version of the expenditure allowances document with corrections including Anglian adjustment figure; SVT figures unchanged.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Base cost modelling decision appendix
documents.summary: Technical appendix detailing 35+ econometric models used for base cost benchmarking across water, wastewater, bioresources, and retail.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Enhancement cost modelling appendix
documents.summary: Scheme-level OLS and random effects models for enhancement cost benchmarking covering storm overflows, phosphorus, metering, and other programmes.

documents.title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Thames Water gated allowance appendix
documents.summary: Thames Water-specific gated allowances: £1bn asset improvement, £250m growth at STWs, £49m LWICA carryover, with 6-gate assurance process.

special_files.title: CAPM Build-up Table (Table 1 from Allowed Return Appendix)
special_files.description: Full WACC decomposition from risk-free rate through to wholesale WACC, with ranges for each CAPM component.
